commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a local-model lean helper that defaults unset `tools.toolSearch` to structured Tool Search controls, wires that runtime config through embedded tool/catalog construction, and updates focused tests plus local-model docs.

PR surface: Source +32, Tests +82, Docs +2. Total +116 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: Source-reproducible, not live-reproduced in this read-only review. Current main shows lean mode only filters tools while Tool Search remains disabled unless configured, and the linked issue supplies real Windows/Ollama evidence for the broader failure.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Human review should resolve the draft state, intentional compatibility change, live-validation expectation, and overlap with the older lean-catalog PR; there is no narrow automated repair to queue.

target.title: fix(agents): compact lean local tool catalogs
target.body:
## Summary
- default `localModelLean` runs to structured Tool Search controls when the operator has not configured `tools.toolSearch`
- keep explicit Tool Search config authoritative, including `tools.toolSearch: false`
- document that lean mode now hides larger plugin/MCP/client catalogs behind `tool_search`, `tool_describe`, and `tool_call`

Refs https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/86599

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts --reporter=dot`
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/local-model-lean.ts src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts docs/concepts/experimental-features.md docs/gateway/local-models.md docs/providers/ollama.md`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/agents/local-model-lean.ts src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- AWS Crabbox targeted proof: `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider aws --label lean-tool-search-targeted-proof-clean --shell -- "node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts --reporter=dot && node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/local-model-lean.ts src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts docs/concepts/experimental-features.md docs/gateway/local-models.md docs/providers/ollama.md && node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/agents/local-model-lean.ts src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts"` (`provider=aws`, `lease=cbx_ebc8c6cb01ef`, `run=run_6899bc5875ac`, exit 0)

## Known blocker
- AWS Crabbox `pnpm check:changed` reached core typecheck, core test typecheck, and broad core lint, then failed on the current-main UI lint regression fixed by https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/88814 (`ui/src/ui/app-chat.test.ts` `no-promise-executor-return`). Run: `provider=aws`, `lease=cbx_932d58c6d323`, `run=run_287d9c8f0a66`.
- `pnpm docs:list` was attempted in the linked worktree and blocked on pnpm's non-TTY module purge prompt, so docs scope was identified with `rg` and the changed public docs pages were edited directly.

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: smaller/local-model runs can keep large extra tool catalogs out of the direct prompt surface without disabling tools entirely.
Real environment tested: local linked OpenClaw worktree plus AWS Crabbox targeted proof.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: see Verification above.
Evidence after fix: local and AWS targeted tests passed 2 Vitest shards / 68 tests; formatting and focused lint passed locally and on AWS.
Observed result after fix: lean-mode embedded runs enable Tool Search controls by default and pass the resolved Tool Search config into core, OpenClaw, MCP, and client catalog construction while preserving explicit operator config.
What was not tested: full `pnpm check:changed` is blocked by the unrelated current-main lint fixed in PR #88814; live Ollama model-family validation is still pending for the broader goal.
target.author: vincentkoc
